library.title: Ot buku
library.subtitle: Dwol peri man gita peri, nicaku i paru nituc i wodhu.

no_results.title: Yub moko ope
no_results.description: Tem loko kabedo mi sayu piny nyoke kabedo.

empty.title: Ka gwoko buku peri utiye nono
empty.description: Caku tic manyen kud i acaki, nyo kel piny ma dong itiye kudu i disk.

project_dialog.title: Tic manyen
project_dialog.description: Mi ire nying man iyer kit mi goyo wer.

album_dialog.title: Album manyen
album_dialog.description: Keth tic ma rwate i buku wer.

album.empty: Tic moko ope i buku wer eni podi.
album.delete_confirm_description: Tic moko jubi ketho ngo, kende kende jubi weko kud i " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Eni kwanyu tic man lembe moku ci ma tiye i iye. Eni copo bedu ngo.

record.title: Rekod
record.subtitle: Kwany lembe maleng, nen rwom peri, man lub script.
record.device_empty: Jam tic moko ope ma junwango.

guide.title: Ponji ma jutelo wigi
guide.subtitle: Wek jatel wi tuko uwoth iri ikind lembe ma igoro, nicaku i acaki nituc i wec ma juweco.
guide.unavailable: Lembe ma jutelo kudu podi epe iwi server podi.
guide.select_project_device: Yer tic moko man jam tic moko ma ibi ketho i iye lembe ma imito ni goyo i iye.
guide.no_record_step: Thenge mi lyethu — epe ku yeny mi goyo wer.
guide.complete_body: Igoro lembe ceke mi script. Dok cen i Audio tab pa project man iyer wer peri ma imaru.

best2min.hint: Timo kero man nen pa lembe iwi lembe ceke mi nwangu kare ma tek pa dakika 2 — icopo loko rwom pare ku cingi ingeye.
best2min.unavailable: Lembe maber loyo-2-minute analysis epe iwi server eni podi.

record.takes_empty: Lembe moko mbe ma jugoro i kare eni podi.
record.ws_disconnected: Dwoko kendo i mita mi rwom...
record.select_project_first: Yer tic moko ma ibi caku.
record.select_device_first: Yer jam tic mi ketho lembe.

no_takes.title: Podi epe
no_takes.description: Goyo lembe manyen nyo kel piny ma con.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Dwol ma rwinyo man lembe ceke ma jutiyo kudu jubi kwanyu.

pipeline.title: Yore mi tic
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Mitu piny mukende ma juketho ngo

export.title: Cwalo piny woko
export.description: Keth fail mir ajiki kud i version ma judaru timo.

notes.placeholder: Lembe ma jukiewo iwi tic eni...

lyrics.placeholder: Kyewo wer kany. Ti ku palette ma yo piny pi ketho Suno meta-tags.
lyrics.versions_empty: Lembe moko ope ma jugwoko podi.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Lembe ma kawoni jubi loko ku ma jugwoko i {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Di wi tag moko mi ketho i cursor.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Unproven — copo bedu ungo ku adwogi ikum adwogi.

prompts.preview_empty: Yer template man ipong ku piny ma tung tung kara inen acaki.
prompts.char_count_warning: Lembe ma jukiewo ma kadhu 1000 copo bedu ma judwoko piny ku Suno.

stems.title: Dwol man gita
stems.empty: Lembe maeni podi jupoko ngo. Ti ku apoka poka ni winjo wer man gita kende kende.
stems.capability_missing: Poko piny ma wok kud i iye epe iwi server eni.
stems.unavailable: Poko wer/gita podi epe iwi server eni podi.

import.title: Kelo piny
import.subtitle: Kel tic ma dong nuti iwi disk i ot kwan.

step1.title: Nwang folda
step1.description: Nyuth i kabedo ma pire tek ku yub peri man wer peri.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg unwange ngo — karatasi ma mitu loko jubi weko.

step2.title: Nen piny
step2.description: Nen nying, kite, man ango ma jubi kelo mapodi imoko ngo.

step3.title: Kelo piny
step3.description: Yik ni goyo waraga man ni cwio yub.
step3.copy_originals: Kwany waraga macon i ot buku
step3.execute_button: Cak kelo piny kud i ngom mange
step3.done_description: Tic ma piny eni juyike i ot buku peri.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Jam tic ma jutiyo kudu kendu man meta-tags pi Suno.

editor.template_hint: Keth lanyuth kama piny acel acel utiye ku nyinge ma jugoro i dul ario — calu lapor, piny ma juloko ma julwongo ni "genre" doko genre ma jugoro i dul aryo mi caku man ario mi thum.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Kit ma juyubu kudu man kite ma Suno ungiyu kudu i kind wec mi wer.

tier_legend.1: Tier 1 — ma jugoro man ma rwate

settings.title: Kabedo
settings.subtitle: Lembe mi yub, dhok, man piny ma dhanu mitu.
settings.gpu_none: Ju ma mio GPU moko ope
settings.lufs_target_hint: Jutiyo kudu calu paru mi caku ka jucwalo piny woko. Suno's default ubedo -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Suno recording guide
guide.subtitle: Kite mi mako dwal man wer mi gita ma kelo adwogi maber.
guide.intro: Suno timo maber uloyu ku lembe ma leng man ma nyang ikume. Lembe maeni uketho i iye yube, rwom ma mitire, man script mi ​​goyo wer pi dakika 3-5.

prep.title: Yub
prep.body: Keth rekod i ot ma juyubu maber nyo acel ma ku piny ma mol (curtains, rugs, bongo i kabati). Nek fans man piny moko ci ma winjo. Med dwond peri pi dakika abic mapodi i goyo wer.

levels.title: Kite: -12 ku -6 dBFS
levels.body: Tem pi rwom ma malu ikind -12 ku -6 dBFS iwi mita. Ithere piny pa rwom meno, dwand ma ngeye doko maleng; malu, peko mi poko piny umedire. Ti ku meter iwi karatasi mi rekod ni ketho rwom peri mapodi i acaku ngo.

distance.title: Bor pa micro: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Bed 15 ku 30 cm ku microphone. Machiegni ku meno medo plosives man proximity effect; mabor utingo reverb man dwand madwong.

script.title: Maku script
script.vowels: Vowels ma ucungo — a, e, i, o, u
script.spoken_phrase: Wec acel ma juweco, kara Suno ebed ku copo mi kwanu dwand peri

expectations.title: Gin ma Suno ogeno
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dry (reverb nyo effects epe), dakika 3 ku 5 mi nen. Dakika 2 ma leng man ma nyuthu piny maber uloyu adwogi maber.

suno_voice_full.name: Lembe mi wer pa Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Dakika 5 ma jutelo: yub, dwal, rwom, wer aryo, rwom, man wec ma juweco.

step.warmup_inst: Bed moth ku ywak, dhoge ma nyap (brrr), man dwand mayom pi dakika acel. Umitu ngo i rekod — etiye kende mi kweyo dhogi mapodi i wer.
step.vowels_inst: Mak vowel acel acel — a, e, i, o, u — pi sekond 3 ku 4 i dwal peri maber, ku dwal ma rwinyo. Eni konyo Suno ni nyang ikum dwal peri.
step.scales_inst: Wer wer ma yot malu man piny, iwi "la" nyo "na". Umitu ngo obed maleng — lembakeca utiye ni ketho dwal peri ubed maber.
step.section: Wer ma juwodho — thenge mir acel
step.section_inst: Wer 8 ku 16 mi wer, ku paru mandha ma imito nyutho. Keth bedo maleng man bedo nuti ire ma pire tek uloyu ikum tic maber.
step.section2_inst: Wer wer mukende 8 ku 16 — maber loyo ubedo chorus nyo dul ma tung tung ku ma ukadhu. Lembe matung tung konyo model ni ngeyo dwal peri.
step.dynamics_inst: Wer wec marom ni caku moth man i thum ku dwal ma tek, manangu ibe nyayu peko i dhogi. Eni nyutho Suno rwom pa dwand peri.
step.spoken_inst: Wec — kud iwer — wec ma nok, ma rwinyo, calu kani ibeweco. Eni konyo Suno ni ngeyo dwand peri mandha.

errors.device_busy: Jam tic mi winjo lembe utiye ka tic ku program mange.
errors.device_not_found: Jam tic mi winjo lembe unwange ngo.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg epe — kethe pi loko fail eni.
errors.permission_denied: Cik jukwero pi yo ma jumiyo.
errors.import_path_not_found: Yore mi kelo piny unwange ngo.
errors.export_failed: Ecopo ngo ni cwalo waraga woko.
